name: JELD-WEN Holding, Inc.
description: JELD-WEN Holding, Inc. is a leading global manufacturer of high-performance interior and exterior door, window, and wall systems. Headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina, the company designs, produces, and distributes a comprehensive portfolio of building products for residential and commercial construction. With a strong presence in North America and Europe, JELD-WEN focuses on delivering innovative, energy-efficient, and durable solutions that enhance the aesthetics and functionality of homes and buildings. The company serves a diverse customer base, including professional contractors, builders, and homeowners, through an extensive network of retail and wholesale distribution channels.
